#
# Rule: connection_string
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves scheme, host, port, path and non-secret query parameters;
# redacts userinfo and the values of known secret query parameters.
# Example: postgresql://admin:s3cret@db.example.com:5432/myapp →
# postgresql://****:****@db.example.com:5432/myapp.
